label: About
title: About The Ash Procession Flare
short_blurb: A daily generated front page where the image is the interface.
body: Daily Frontpage is a daily generated interactive front page. Each edition starts from recent saved signals and source research, becomes a new image-led scene, and stays explorable in the archive. The image is the interface: visible marks, objects, and surfaces in the scene open the real sources that shaped the day.

This iteration began with 16 recent saved-signal files and 16 captured links, then narrowed the page to 9 source windows around Requiem, by feeo and 1 hour focus sound | ambient | fragrance note | art | riverside | Shimon Hoshino, plus 7 more. A source image from f4.bcbits.com helped set the palette, contrast, edge behavior, and gesture. The scene became The Ash Procession Flare: A vast charcoal paper field fills the frame, matte and nearly empty, with more than two thirds left as open black-gray air. One dominant surface: dry graphite darkness. After the image was made, a plate-reading pass mapped 9 visible regions and the mask audit tightened them against broad pearled wash around REQUIEM, dominant diagonal silver flare, and jagged torn graphite edge.

typography.rationale: Bricolage Grotesque and Space Grotesk fit record, arcade, and listening-room editions while Fraunces keeps source captions tactile.
